name: grid-layout-news-01
title: Grid Layout (News 01)
author: ilinxa
description: Slot-based magazine layout — optional hero / filter bar / sidebar + a generic main-column tower (1 large + 2-up + N-up medium grid) + IntersectionObserver-driven infinite scroll. Generic over item type. Companion useMagazineFilter hook for in-memory filter + page state.
